summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Silkroute Naturals luxury e-commerce. Backend: 35/35 pytest cases pass (100%) covering auth, products, coupons, custom-nut-butter pricing+create, orders w/ stock decrement & coupon, bookings, gifting, blog, banners, contact, reviews, analytics, and admin product/coupon CRUD with role enforcement. Frontend: home, shop, product detail, add-to-cart, cart drawer, login (customer + admin), checkout with WELCOME10 coupon, place order (mocked Razorpay), order appears in /account history, journal listing, admin dashboard with 10 nav sections + analytics charts, custom nut butter builder all render correctly.

minor.issue: No brute-force lockout / rate-limit implemented (auth_testing.md mentions 5-fail lockout). Not blocking but recommended hardening.
secure=True + samesite='none' is correct for cross-site preview, but means cookies will not work over plain HTTP locally. Acceptable for prod-ready preview.

ui_bugs.issue: Page title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'Silkroute Naturals' branded title

React hydration warning: <span> rendered inside <option> (caused by Emergent's static-analyzer instrumentation injecting display:contents span into option text). Harmless in production build but pollutes console. Consider passing literal strings to <option> children rather than expression-wrapped variables.

issues: Luxury palette beige/ivory + gold accent renders correctly
Marquee origins ticker, hero backdrop map, route stops, and journal cards all visually consistent with luxury brief

action_items: Set <title>Silkroute Naturals — Single-Origin Dry Fruits</title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html (currently 'Emergent | Fullstack App').
(Optional) Replace `{ORIGINS.map(o => <option ...>{o}</option>)}` in Shop.jsx with plain children to silence hydration warning from instrumented build.
(Optional hardening) Add login rate-limit / brute-force lockout per /app/auth_testing.md guideline.
No functional bugs — app is production-ready for a mocked-payment preview.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py uses bcrypt + JWT correctly; bcrypt hashes start with $2b$. Cookies set as httpOnly, secure, samesite=none — appropriate for cross-site preview.
server.py is 770 lines and monolithic. Recommend splitting into routes/{auth,products,orders,admin,content}.py modules for maintainability per the 700-line guideline.
Mongo ObjectId is consistently excluded via projection {'_id': 0} on all reads — good.
Seed admin block correctly updates password hash if env password changed (idempotent).
All Pydantic input models present; input validation enforced.

CORS allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is technically incorrect per spec (browsers require explicit origins with credentials). The allow_origin_regex='.*' workaround makes browsers accept it, but for production tighten to explicit origins. Current preview cookies still flow.
data-testid coverage is excellent on hero CTA, add-to-cart, cart-checkout, login-submit, builder-step-*, nut-*, admin-nav-*, admin product/coupon save buttons.
Razorpay mock: order saves payment_status='paid' immediately — clearly labelled 'test mode — payment is mocked' on checkout UI.
test_credentials: admin@silkroutenaturals.com / Silkroute@2026 ; customer@example.com / Customer@2026 — both verified working
seed_data_creation: Seeded data verified: 10 products, 3+ coupons (WELCOME10 confirmed), 4 blog posts, 2 banners. Test artefacts created during testing: 1 customer order (SR260425144843), 1 review, 1 booking, 1 gifting inquiry, 1 contact message, 1 custom nut butter order. All TEST_ prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend and core frontend flows are solid. If retesting, only minor cosmetic fixes (page title, hydration span warning) remain. Re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. Builder full 6-step flow add-to-cart was not asserted end-to-end via Playwright (only step rendering verified) — selectors builder-step-{0..5}, nut-{id}, flavor-{id}, builder-add-to-cart confirmed to exist; full multi-step UI walkthrough can be added.
rca_of_issues: No functional issues. Minor cosmetic items only. Title is the default Emergent template title — needs replacement in index.html. The hydration warning originates from Emergent's webpack instrumentation injecting <span style='display:contents'> wrappers around dynamic JSX expressions; it is invisible to users but appears in dev-mode console.
